title: Paid but credits or license did not reflect?
description: It's worth double-checking that the payment went through on your end — sometimes transactions don't complete fully.
helperText: Use the *Retrieve License Key* button in the widget to recover the license and credits linked to your payment.

title: Incorrect answer?
description: LaceFi answers based on general knowledge by default. Adding your course notes helps it give answers that match your specific material.
helperText: Upload your notes in the *Notes tab* and try again.

title: Notes or resources upload problem?
description: Uploads can fail silently if the file is too large, in an unsupported format, or if your connection dropped mid-upload.
helperText: Retry the upload from the *Notes tab* and note which file or resource failed and what happened.

title: Did not receive OTP?
description: Please confirm that the email address you entered is correct. Sometimes OTP emails may take a few minutes to arrive.
helperText: Check your Spam, Junk, or Promotions folder and retry sending the OTP if needed.
